title: [CI:DOCS] Fix exit code example in podman-run.1.md

comments.body: LGTM. Can you check if the same problem exists in the `podman create` manpage?

I guess you mean `podman exec` manpage


```
$ grep -A1 "exit 3" ./docs/source/markdown/podman-exec.1.md 
    $ podman exec ctrID /bin/sh -c 'exit 3'; echo $?
    3
$
```

It looks good.
